swarms.name: CAPITAL Foundation Swarm
swarms.mission: Define canonical market, instrument, order, trade, position, custody, settlement and proof contracts inherited from the Carbon Actual foundation.

swarms.name: Market and Exchange Swarm
swarms.mission: Build market discovery, RFQ, auctions, bids, offers, negotiation, barter, swaps and order-book services.

swarms.name: Asset and Instrument Swarm
swarms.mission: Model financial, physical, circular, environmental, digital, enterprise and future-value instruments with jurisdiction-aware restrictions.

swarms.name: I/O Settlement Swarm
swarms.mission: Connect trading commitments to accounts, escrow, collateral, clearing, delivery, fees, taxes and settlement.

swarms.name: Custody, Delivery and Proof Swarm
swarms.mission: Verify title, provenance, quantity, quality, custody, delivery, performance and final settlement.

swarms.name: Risk, Compliance and Market Integrity Swarm
swarms.mission: Enforce participant eligibility, market permissions, limits, surveillance, conflict controls and jurisdiction-specific restrictions.

swarms.name: Market Intelligence and Forecast Swarm
swarms.mission: Build research, price intelligence, opportunity curation, scenario analysis, forecasts and evidence-aware recommendations.

swarms.name: HAPI Trading and Capability Swarm
swarms.mission: Connect HAPI VECTORs, capability unlocks, research, risk suitability, mandates, portfolios and human final authority to CAPITAL.

swarms.name: Entity Treasury and Procurement Swarm
swarms.mission: Support company treasury, procurement, inventory trading, supplier markets, hedging, approvals and entity-AI coordination.

swarms.name: Trading-as-a-Service Swarm
swarms.mission: Expose secure APIs, webhooks, white-label workspaces and external entity onboarding for authorized trading functions.

swarms.name: CAPITAL Experience Swarm
swarms.mission: Design the futuristic, immersive but operational trading interface for HAPIs, entities, operators and external clients.

swarms.name: CAPITAL DevSecOps and Reliability Swarm
swarms.mission: Provide CI/CD, test environments, observability, security, backups, incident response and release controls.
